# Iarone

> AI-Powered 3D Commerce Platform

Iarone is a platform that transforms 2D e-commerce product visuals into web-ready 3D and Augmented Reality (AR) experiences.

## Target Audience
E-commerce teams and agencies in Turkey, MENA (Middle East and North Africa), and global markets.

## Core Capabilities
- Converts product photos or existing 3D files into optimized publish packages.
- Provides interactive 3D web viewers and mobile AR experiences.
- Supports outputs in `GLB` and `USDZ` formats.
- Delivers AR-ready web integration via embed codes and public links.

## Supported Output Formats
- **GLB:** Standard 3D model format for web.
- **USDZ:** Standard 3D model format for iOS/Apple devices.
- **Embed:** HTML/JS snippet to embed the 3D viewer.
- **Public Link:** Direct shareable link to view the 3D/AR model.

## Target Integration Areas
- B2B API integrations
- Custom production plans
- E-commerce platforms (custom solutions)

## Public Pages
- Home: https://iarone.com/
- Solutions (Market): https://iarone.com/market.html

## Contact Information
